title: Scientific Machine Learning, Computational Science, and Miscellaneous Topics

AN APPLIED MATHEMATICS BLOG



Notes on scientific machine learning, numerical analysis, optimization, and the mathematical structure connecting them.

title: Scientific Machine Learning, Computational Science, and Miscellaneous Topics
text:
Latest notes
Each post aims to cover a specific topic in math, machine learning, computational science, or all of the above!

title: About
text:
I am Alex Benanti, an Applied Mathematics PhD researcher at Stony Brook University interested in scientific machine learning, numerical analysis, and computation for partial differential equations.
This blog is intended to be a collection of explanations of traditional methods and ML methods for scientific computing that I have come across in my studies.
